name: Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack For Dog With Lamb And Carrot 4x15g
shortDescription: Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack Lamb & Carrot is a creamy lickable dog treat made with real chicken, lamb, and carrots, offering a low-fat, high-moisture reward for daily treating and bonding.
description: Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack Lamb & Carrot is a smooth, creamy lickable dog treat made with real chicken, lamb, and wholesome carrots, designed to deliver delicious flavor with balanced nutrition. Its soft, spoon-friendly texture makes it easy to serve in small portions, creating enjoyable bonding moments while rewarding your dog as part of a healthy daily routine. With 32% chicken and 4% lamb , this lick snack provides high-quality animal protein to support muscle maintenance, while carrots (4%) contribute natural nutrients and gentle fiber. The carefully balanced formula is light, low in fat, and high in moisture, helping support hydration and easy digestion. Sunflower oil enhances taste and palatability, while a natural flavor enhancer made from chicken liver and heart digest boosts aroma and acceptance. Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack Lamb & Carrot is ideal as a dessert, reward, or enrichment treat when fed responsibly alongside a complete and balanced diet. Ingredients Water Chicken (32%) Tapioca starch Lamb (4%) Carrot (4%) Sunflower oil Flavour enhancer (Chicken liver & heart digest, pea protein, salt) Nutritional Composition Crude Protein: 10% Crude Fat: 2.5% Crude Ash: 0.5% Crude Fibre: 0.1% Moisture: 80% Feeding Recommendations & Warnings Treats should not exceed 10% of a dog’s daily caloric intake Serve as a reward, dessert, or daily treat Always provide fresh drinking water Not suitable for human consumption
